recommendations.title: If I Were a Rich Man
recommendations.overview: A man which wife is filing to divorce him wins 25 million EUR in the lotto, hiding her to prevent sharing the half of the prize.

recommendations.title: The Ties

recommendations.title: Still Alice
recommendations.overview: Alice Howland, happily married with three grown children, is a renowned linguistics professor who starts to forget words. When she receives a devastating diagnosis, Alice and her family find their bonds tested.

recommendations.director: Massimo Venier, Giacomo Poretti, Aldo Baglio, Giovanni Storti

recommendations.title: Slam
recommendations.overview: Samuele is 16 and has a passion for skateboarding. He has big dreams: going to university, move to California, and travel, but things change when he meets Alice, who could be the girl of his life.

recommendations.title: Still Time

recommendations.title: Paris-Manhattan
recommendations.overview: Alice, an obsessed Woody Allen fan, meets Pierre in a night-club and falls in love with him. But when Pierre sees Alice's sister Hélène, things start to get complicated.
